generic_primitive.blocked_by: Homeboy has no artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots. This file is a data-only contract until that upstream command exists.

metadata.missing_upstream_contract: homeboy artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots

readiness.coverage_contract: Data-only coverage gap report contract over an approved offloaded Woo DB/API campaign artifact root. It is blocked until Homeboy owns an artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots; proven status also requires reviewer-facing run and coverage_gap_report artifact refs.

required_refs: reviewer-facing coverage gap report artifact ref

proven_when: Homeboy ships a real artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots.
An approved offloaded campaign run provides a reviewer-facing artifact root for prior workload outputs.
The runner collects the declared coverage_gap_report fuzz.report JSON artifact as reviewer-facing evidence.

metadata.coverage_shape: Declared coverage gap report over available WooCommerce DB/API fuzzer artifacts; execution blocked on upstream artifact-postprocess
